rationale: Educ. Code §49.257 governs maintenance tax levies by joint boards for component districts. It does not reference or depend on the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. Increasing the exemption indirectly reduces the taxable base but creates no operative conflict with this statute.
quote: the consolidated taxing district may levy, assess, and collect a maintenance tax for the benefit of the component districts at a rate that exceeds $1.50 per $100 valuation of taxable property
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on consolidated taxing district revenue is possible but does not require amendment to §49.257.
